I always visualize the recurrent nerve at the beginning, because most damages to the recurrent nerve are not because you cut it, it's actually because you retract the recurrent nerve, and most of them are, well, it's neuropraxia and they're temporary, but they will still last for two or three months until they recover the function of the recurrent nerve.
